from opentelemetry import trace
from opentelemetry.propagate import extract

tracer = trace.get_tracer(__name__)

def background_worker(payload, carrier_context):
    # Correct: explicitly extract and link the parent context to maintain a contiguous distributed trace
    ctx = extract(carrier_context)
    with tracer.start_as_current_span("worker_process", context=ctx):
        process(payload)
